text: 新项目介绍：早期项目风险高，本文只做介绍并非投资建议@LENX_Finance  Backed by @fraxfinance, @Bitcoin, @zetablockchain  @FjordFoundry旨在做流动性协议，并且支持BTC资产的抵押借贷。聚合了市面上核心的借贷协议来提供最佳利率。目前官网除了借贷之外，还有BTC和ETH之间的桥。目前LBP正在进行中。官网介绍的四大产品：1⃣️xBTC BTC StablecoinLENX issues a stablecoin, xBTC, a BTC pegged asset. xBTC is the first stablecoin to seamlessly transfer and redeem native Bitcoin without a long wait on any chain.2⃣️Omnichain BTC SwapLENX's core lies in its ability to conduct swaps and facilitate liquidity for native Bitcoin into any chain.3⃣️XD, permissionless BAMM gaugeFrax BAMM is the core lending facility for LENX, allowing debt origination, customized non-custodial loans, and onboarding collateral assets to the omnichain economy with Frax.4⃣️BOX, Bitcoin-backed CDPLENX issues a USD-pegged stablecoin, BOX. BOX is the first stablecoin to collaterize native Bitcoin, currently in development and will be revealed at V2.
content:
新项目介绍：早期项目风险高，本文只做介绍并非投资建议

@LENX_Finance
Backed by @fraxfinance, @Bitcoin, @zetablockchain @FjordFoundry
旨在做流动性协议，并且支持BTC资产的抵押借贷。聚合了市面上核心的借贷协议来提供最佳利率。目前官网除了借贷之外，还有BTC和ETH之间的桥。

目前LBP正在进行中。

官网介绍的四大产品：
1⃣️xBTC BTC Stablecoin
LENX issues a stablecoin, xBTC, a BTC pegged asset. xBTC is the first stablecoin to seamlessly transfer and redeem native Bitcoin without a long wait on any chain.
2⃣️Omnichain BTC Swap
LENX's core lies in its ability to conduct swaps and facilitate liquidity for native Bitcoin into any chain.
3⃣️XD, permissionless BAMM gauge
Frax BAMM is the core lending facility for LENX, allowing debt origination, customized non-custodial loans, and onboarding collateral assets to the omnichain economy with Frax.
4⃣️BOX, Bitcoin-backed CDP
LENX issues a USD-pegged stablecoin, BOX. BOX is the first stablecoin to collaterize native Bitcoin, currently in development and will be revealed at V2.
